pull_request.title: sync: update Python SDK
pull_request.body: Automated sync from lightcone-python at commit `78babe6`.

changed_files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [project]
 name = "tzafon"
-version = "2.35.0"
+version = "2.37.1"
 description = "The official Python library for the lightcone API"
 dynamic = ["readme"]
 license = "Apache-2.0"

@@ -86,8 +86,9 @@ def _extract_items(
     index += 1
     if is_dict(obj):
         try:
-            # We are at the last entry in the path so we must remove the field
-            if (len(path)) == index:
+            # Remove the field if there are no more dict keys in the path,
+            # only "<array>" traversal markers or end.
+            if all(p == "<array>" for p in path[index:]):
                 item = obj.pop(key)
             else:
                 item = obj[key]

@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 # File generated from our OpenAPI spec by Stainless. See CONTRIBUTING.md for details.
 
 __title__ = "tzafon"
-__version__ = "2.35.0"  # x-release-please-version
+__version__ = "2.37.1"  # x-release-please-version

@@ -51,9 +51,9 @@ def create(self, kind: str = "browser", **kwargs: Any) -> ComputerSession:
         """
         response = self._client.computers.create(kind=kind, **kwargs)
         assert response.id is not None
-        display = kwargs.get("display") or {}
-        width = display.get("width", 1024)
-        height = display.get("height", 768)
+        display: dict[str, Any] = kwargs.get("display") or {}
+        width: int = display.get("width", 1024)
+        height: int = display.get("height", 768)
         return ComputerSession(self._client, response.id, width=width, height=height)

+        # `getattr(obj, '$type')`
